howItWorks.intro: This aquarium stocking calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Fish Capacity
rules.formula: Fish = (Gallons × Filtration Factor) / Avg Fish Size
rules.explanation: Total inches of fish the tank can support.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: One inch of fish per gallon of water. It's a guideline, not exact.

faq.q: Can I overstock with good filtration?
faq.a: Over-filtration allows slightly more fish, but never exceed 130% of the guideline.

howWeCalculate.intro: This aquarium stocking calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
